title: Één factuur.
desc: Ontvang één overzichterlijke factuur met alle gemaakte kosten per maand

treatments.brief: A single consolidated invoice document: header 'Factuur · maart 2026', per-ship line rows (MS Aldebaran €4.100, MS Castor €3.150, ...), and a bold totaal at the bottom of the panel.
A cost-per-ship breakdown of the month total: a horizontal stacked bar (one segment per ship) OR a small waffle, with a legend and the total.
A month-total hero figure: large €X.XXX 'totaal maart 2026' + 2-3 supporting stats (aantal bestellingen, schepen, gem. per schip).
A MANY->ONE consolidation: three small per-ship invoice slips funnel/merge into one combined invoice (the merge is the signature).
A per-month invoice timeline: jan / feb / mrt rows with amounts + a 'gefactureerd' status, current month highlighted.
